## Checklist

- [ ] Metadata is complete and the number is unique
- [ ] Normative statements use stable requirement IDs
- [ ] Compatibility class and review window are correct
- [ ] Alternatives and security/privacy impacts are documented
- [ ] Decision index is updated when recording a decision
- [ ] Specification and fixture licensing boundaries are preserved
